title: Swarm Orchestrator v8 Contract Obligation
description: Single contract obligation. Contracts serialize as JSONL where each line is one obligation. See docs/v8-overhaul-guide.md §5.1 and docs/v8-implementation-guide.md §4. Phase 5 adds the optional `deterministicStrategy` field for WASM-eligible obligations (impl guide §8 / overhaul §5.6). Phase 7 adds five additional oneOf branches: function-must-have-signature, property-must-hold, import-graph-must-satisfy, coverage-must-exceed, performance-must-not-regress (impl guide §10).

path.description: Filesystem path that must exist after execution. Relative to repository root.

deterministicStrategy.description: Optional name of a deterministic strategy registered with the WASM runtime. When set, the population manager dispatches this obligation to the runtime instead of the synthesis tournament. See docs/v8-implementation-guide.md §8.

command.description: Shell command whose exit code must be zero. Run from repository root.

deterministicStrategy.description: Optional name of a deterministic strategy registered with the WASM runtime. When set, the population manager dispatches this obligation to the runtime instead of the synthesis tournament.

command.description: Shell command whose exit code must be zero. Run from repository root.

deterministicStrategy.description: Optional name of a deterministic strategy registered with the WASM runtime. When set, the population manager dispatches this obligation to the runtime instead of the synthesis tournament.

file.description: Repo-relative path to the file declaring the named function.

name.description: Function or method name as it appears in source.

signature.description: Signature substring including parens. Whitespace is collapsed before comparison.

predicate.description: Shell command, run from repo root. Exit zero ⇒ property holds.

target.description: Human-readable target the property is asserted to hold over.

constraint.description: Structural constraint asserted over the import graph rooted at scope.

threshold.description: Threshold percentage in [0, 100]; coverage must be >= threshold.

benchmark.description: Shell command whose stdout's last numeric token is the current value.

baseline.description: Repo-relative path to baseline JSON ({ "value": number }).

threshold.description: Maximum allowed fractional regression. current > baseline * (1 + threshold) fails.
